title.en: Fastener Packaging and Shipping Guide: Export from China
title.zh: 紧固件包装和运输指南：从中国出口
title.es: Guía de Embalaje y Envío de Sujetadores: Exportación desde China
title.ar: دليل تعبئة وشحن المثبتات: التصدير من الصين
title.fr: Guide d'Emballage et d'Expédition des Fixations: Exportation de Chine
title.pt: Guia de Embalagem e Envio de Fixadores: Exportação da China
title.ru: Руководство по Упаковке и Доставке Крепежа: Экспорт из Китая
title.ja: ファスナー包装而出荷ガイド：中国からの輸出
title.de: Fastener Verpackung und Versand Leitfaden: Export aus China
title.hi: फास्टनर पैकेजिंग और शिपिंग गाइड: चीन से निर्यात

description.en: Proper fastener packaging for export from China. Sea-worthy packaging, palletization, moisture protection, and container loading best practices for international shipping.
description.zh: 从中国出口的适当紧固件包装。海运包装、托盘化、防潮处理和国际运输集装箱装载最佳实践。
description.es: Embalaje adecuado de sujetadores para exportación desde China. Embalaje marinero, paletización, protección contra humedad y mejores prácticas de carga de contenedores.
description.ar: التعبئة المناسبة للمثبتات للتصدير من الصين. التعبئة الملائمة للشحن البحري والمنصات والحماية من الرطوبة وأفضل ممارسات تحميل الحاويات.
description.fr: Emballage approprié des fixations pour exportation de Chine. Emballage maritime, palettisation, protection contre l'humidité et meilleures pratiques de chargement de conteneurs.
description.pt: Embalagem adequada de fixadores para exportação da China. Embalagem para transporte marítimo, paletização, proteção contra umidade e melhores práticas de carga de contêineres.
description.ru: Правильная упаковка крепежа для экспорта из Китая. Упаковка для морской перевозки, паллетирование, защита от влаги и лучшие практики загрузки контейнеров.
description.ja: 中国からの輸出のための適切なファスナー包装。海上輸送対応包装、パレット化、湿気保護、コンテナ積み込みのベストプラクティス。
description.de: Ordnungsgemäße Verpackung von Befestigungen für Export aus China. Seetüchtige Verpackung, Palettierung, Feuchtigkeitsschutz und Best Practices für Containerbeladung.
description.hi: चीन से निर्यात के लिए उचित फास्टनर पैकेजिंग। समुद्री योग्य पैकेजिंग, पैलेटाइज़ेशन, नमी सुरक्षा, और अंतरराष्ट्रीय शिपिंग के लिए कंटेनर लोडिंग सर्वोत्तम अभ्यास।

keywords: fastener packaging, export packaging, sea-worthy packaging, palletization, moisture protection, container loading

body.en:
Proper packaging prevents damage during ocean transit:

1. Inner Packaging:
- Clear plastic bags for each product type
- VCI (Vapor Corrosion Inhibitor) paper interleaved
- Silica gel desiccant packs for moisture protection

2. Outer Packaging:
- Double-wall corrugated cartons (5-ply minimum)
- Edge protectors on corners
- Water-resistant exterior coating

3. Palletization:
- Standard 1140x1140mm wooden pallets
- Stretch wrap for stability
- Pallet height max 1.2m for safety

TradeGo uses sea-worthy export packaging as standard for all international shipments.

Proper container loading prevents damage and maximizes utilization:

1. Container Preparation:
- Clean, dry container
- Container inspection before loading
- Floor line with moisture barrier

2. Loading Sequence:
- Heavy boxes first along walls
- Lighter boxes toward center
- Uniform weight distribution
- 2-3cm gap from walls

3. Securing:
- Strapping or banding for stability
- Load bars or lumber for movement prevention
- Fill voids with dunnage

4. Documentation:
- Accurate packing list
- Container photos before sealing
- Seal numbers recorded
